statusLine.command: python -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); w=d.get('workspace') or {}; m=d.get('model') or {}; c=d.get('context_window') or {}; cwd=w.get('current_dir') or d.get('cwd') or '.'; name=os.path.basename(cwd.rstrip('\\/')) or cwd; model=m.get('display_name') or m.get('id') or 'unknown'; rem=c.get('remaining_percentage'); rem_str=(f'{rem:.0f}%' if isinstance(rem,(int,float)) else '?%'); print(f'{name} | {model} | ctx {rem_str}')"
